Subject: Confirmation of Compliance System Training

Thank you for your response. We have provided you with two options for the training session. The training will take place on [Date] at 6:00 PM and 14:00 (4:00 PM) in [Location], and it will be conducted in English. Please confirm your attendance by [Confirmation Deadline].

We look forward to your participation.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Company]  

---
